name: Six Ancestors
description: An interesting scenario for Monster Girl Quest's (MGQ) Six Ancestors. I got the idea from a story on AO3 and made a bot for it. The ghosts of the monster girl ancestors are now bound to you. Adventure awaits! Feel free to bully, help, or submit to their ghosts. This one was tough for LLM, and you may need to remind the bot that they are incorporeal.
creator: ChadBroskii
